'''Ragna III''' was a [[Forest/Legends|forest]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Yuzzem]] race.

Ragna III was also home to much larger predators than the Yuzzem, forcing these thick-furred natives to roam in prides in the planet's treetops. The planet's [[Temperature/Legends|temperature]] was mild.

The Yuzzem were [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], sent to serve in Imperial [[Mine/Legends|mining]] facilities. However, the Yuzzem were hard to control, and often caused riots and breakouts, especially when teamed up with [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] slaves. Thus, many Yuzzem were able to return to Ragna III, sparking a new generation of Yuzzem eager to travel [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
